task_input: Add a --dry-run flag to pipeline doctor that prints the checks it would run without executing any of them.

planning.issue_body: pipeline doctor always executes its full check suite. Add a --dry-run flag that lists the checks it would run, in order, without running them.

acceptance_criteria.statement: The plan adds a --dry-run flag to the doctor command.
The plan lists checks without executing them when --dry-run is set.
The plan adds a test covering the new flag.
